beats.sound: office ambience compresses into a single low tone

beats.say: You are standing. But not in the Archive.

beats.sys:
Reconstruction Instance Initialized
Case: L-1184 — LANTERN RECORD
Stability Index: 0.62 (UNSTABLE)

beats.say: A neutral space forms around perception — dim, undefined, fog at the edges. Faint outlines try to resolve. The system is building the memory in real time.
The floor materializes first: worn concrete, water-staining, an irregular lighting grid above. Then walls. Then sound that doesn't belong to any direction.
Nothing is fully correct. Everything is almost correct.
Control returns. Movement here feels heavier than the Archive — not laggy. Weighted. As if the space resists you.
"I told you I was there."
"No. You weren't."
Then both, overlapping: "That's not what happened."
A reconstructed intent settles into you, with no prompt to explain it: Locate the primary witness anchor.
A door appears at the end of the corridor. Then it's gone. Then it's back, slightly closer. No animation. Just state resolving incorrectly.

beats.sound: measured footsteps ahead — human — stopping, then resuming, as if waiting

beats.say: The corridor opens into a semi-industrial room. Crates with unreadable labels. Water pooling in patterns that shouldn't hold. A single chair, placed too intentionally to be accidental.
A figure sits in the chair. Head lowered. Motionless. It reacts before it's fully visible.
"You're not supposed to be here yet."
The figure resolves. A man, mid-30s. His clothing can't decide between uniform and civilian — the fabric changes when you don't look at it directly. Eye contact lands slightly off-target.
"They said this one was clean." A pause. "It's never clean."

beats.sound: a voice overlaps reality, distant, unclear

beats.say: "…don't trust first readings…"
The witness reacts — not surprise. Recognition.
"If you keep going…" He pauses, like the sentence has competing versions. "You'll remember it wrong." A beat. "Or worse."
The room begins to destabilize — edges blur, sound detaches from space, the light loses its source. A final certainty forms with no words behind it:

beats.sys: Stabilize the memory or lose the structure.

beats.say: The space reconfigures around the witness. Deeper layers of L-1184 begin to load.
